summary: Analytics bug fix verified. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend shows non-zero Daily P&L (+$23.57), Win Rate (66.1% with 37W/19L), and Closed Trades (56) on Overview page. P&L curve displays actual equity growth. Global Analytics shows consistent metrics across Performance tab (realized_pnl +$23.57, win_rate 66.1%) and Charts tab (cumulative PnL curve with actual data points).

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'WebSocket is closed before connection established' - transient reconnection issue, not blocking functionality as HTTP polling fallback works

backend_analytics_fix_tests: GET /api/status returns non-zero stats (daily_pnl, win_count, loss_count, close_count, win_rate) - PASS
GET /api/analytics/global returns non-zero strategy_performance metrics - PASS
GET /api/analytics/pnl-history returns non-empty points array and close_trades > 0 - PASS
Data consistency: close_count matches across /api/status, /api/analytics/global, /api/analytics/pnl-history - PASS
Data consistency: win_rate approximately matches between /api/status and /api/analytics/global - PASS
GET /api/analytics/global timeseries.cumulative_pnl has non-zero last point with close_count field - PASS
POST /api/test/clear-trades then POST /api/test/inject-trades correctly updates stats - PASS
frontend_visual_tests: Overview page: Daily P&L card shows +$23.57 (non-zero) - PASS
Overview page: Win Rate card shows 66.1% with 37W/19L sub-text - PASS
Overview page: Closed Trades card shows 56 (non-zero) - PASS
Overview page: P&L Curve chart shows actual equity growth (not flat) - PASS
Global Analytics page Performance tab: Realized P&L +$23.57, Win Rate 66.1%, 64 Total Trades - PASS
Global Analytics page Charts tab: Cumulative P&L curve with actual data points - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: state.py Line 128-135: add_trade() correctly increments win_count/loss_count based on pnl sign
state.py Line 149-174: snapshot() correctly computes close_count = win_count + loss_count and win_rate
global_analytics_service.py Line 84-88: close_trades filter uses `t.pnl and t.pnl != 0` correctly
global_analytics_service.py Line 206-260: get_signal_timeseries() now filters closed trades for PnL curve
server.py Line 1505-1538: /analytics/pnl-history correctly filters by pnl != 0
server.py Line 1675: inject-trades now uses state.add_trade() to properly update counters
Frontend dashboardStore.js Line 58-71: setWsSnapshot correctly updates stats from WebSocket

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements showing correct non-zero values)

seed_data_creation: Test trades injected via POST /api/test/inject-trades (57 trades initially, 113 total after re-inject)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics bug fix verified working. The fix ensures: (1) inject-trades uses state.add_trade() to update counters, (2) get_signal_timeseries() separates closed trades (pnl!=0) for cumulative PnL from all trades for signal frequency, (3) clear-trades recomputes counters. Test trades need to be injected via POST /api/test/inject-trades for stats to show non-zero values. WebSocket has intermittent connection issues but HTTP polling fallback works correctly.

fix_summary.root_cause: inject-trades endpoint bypassed state.add_trade() so win/loss counters never updated; get_signal_timeseries() included open trades (pnl=0) in cumulative PnL, flattening equity curve
fix_applied: server.py: inject-trades now calls state.add_trade() for each trade
global_analytics_service.py: get_signal_timeseries() filters to closed trades (pnl!=0) for PnL calculation
fix_summary.verification: All analytics endpoints now return consistent non-zero values for close_count, win_rate, realized_pnl
